tier: Tier 7.7t - Low-Rank State Repair Campaign Contract
claim: Tier 7.7t locks the Tier 7.7 low-rank state repair campaign without implementing or scoring any repair candidate. It predeclares 8 failure modes, 5 repair families (A-E), mandatory random-projection and nonlinear-lag controls, state-geometry and task metrics, 13 outcome classes, baseline escalation rules, stopping rules, and route conditions to Tier 7.8 and 7.9.
caveat: Contract only; not a repair implementation, not model scoring, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, not hardware/native transfer, and not language/AGI/ASI evidence.
